params.SpellDescription: Roll a six-sided die. If you roll a 1, CARDNAME has no effect. Otherwise, search your library for the indicated card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Roll a six-sided die. If you roll a 1, CARDNAME has no effect. Otherwise, search your library for the indicated card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
